# Waterklip

> Suiwer Water, Ryk aan Minerale — Purified, mineral-enriched drinking water from Bellville, Cape Town, South Africa.

## About

Waterklip is a South African water purification and bottling business based in Oakdale, Bellville (Cape Town). We produce purified drinking water that is enriched with essential minerals: Calcium, Magnesium, Potassium, Sodium, Silica, and Bicarbonate.

We also offer a personalised/branded bottle label service for events, businesses, and gifts.

## Website

- URL: https://waterklip.co.za
- Language: Afrikaans (South Africa)
- Type: Single-page website

## Page Sections

- **Tuis (Home)** — Hero section introducing the brand
- **Oor Ons (About Us)** — Brand story and values
- **Produk (Product)** — 4-step water purification process
- **Hoekom Waterklip (Why Waterklip)** — Six key benefits of our water
- **Persoonlike Bottels (Personalised Bottles)** — Custom-labelled bottle service
- **Kontak (Contact)** — Contact details and social media links

## Contact

- Phone: +27 74 581 8176
- Email: waterklipwater@gmail.com
- Address: Shop 6, 79 Clyde Street, Oakdale, Bellville, 7530, South Africa
